## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` succeeds
- [ ] `swift run Sweep --dryrun` passes (safety + localization self-checks)
- [ ] No changes weaken `SafetyGuard`
- [ ] New cleanup targets (if any) go through `CleanupCatalog` and default to Trash
- [ ] New UI strings (if any) are added to the localization table in **both** `ru` and `en`
- [ ] UI changes include before/after screenshots
